quote:
Thank you so much Raz and Paul!
We have great memories from a great night! 
Couldn't of asked for a better service. 
Five star communication & professionalism and the link is so easy to access and share. Thanks again 🤗
These guys were fabulous. On time, excellent service, the 360 booth was perfect and I highly recommend this company. It made the party. Worth every penny!

Would recommend, brilliant communication , very professional and both staff were approachable, friendly, polite and provided a great service, will 100% use again..
Thanks guys..

Words can’t describe how good Razvan and his brother are. They set up for my daughter’s 10th birthday party, they were so patient and nice and the kids and parents had a blast on the 360 video fun.
             
I will recommend them any day. Good customer service. 
Thank you for making my daughter’s 10th birthday party a remarkable one.

I would highly recommend Razvan and FunLoading360. Fantastic service. Razvan and his colleague set up the beautiful photo service very quickly, spent time making sure we understood how to use everything and then came back promptly to take things away.
             Very professional and kind. The photos were fantastic quality, unlimited printing - was great value for money. Everyone loved it! We wo

I booked this for my wife's 50th and it went down a storm, everyone used it and we now have some great memories of a special night.
             Razvan & his team were professional at all times. I would thoroughly recomend them

Razvan and his team were AMAZING from start to finish. The communication throughout the process was second to none. The staff all loved using the 360 Photobooth, the props were excellent and it was so much fun.
             Thank you both! Will definitely be using you boys again. Cannot recommend you enough!!!

Brilliant from start to finish, Paul and Laura were great, super friendly and good fun to have at my party. 
Even got some dancing from Paul himself!
             Everyone at the party loved the 360! So much so that i’m booking them again at christmas! 5 star x Thanks Paul & Laura xxx
Very engaging and good hosts, guests Absolutley loved it. Plenty of props to use. Great for a 30th birthday

Secured a booking with FunLoading360 for an anniversary event. 

Razvan was an absolute pleasure to work with. Extremely helpful.
             Easy and responsive communication. Very competitive rates.

On the day, set up was seamless and our guests absolutely loved the Vintage Photo Booth. Set up comes with party accessories to make your pictures fun!

Razvan provided full support and options inc
We hired the photo Booth on Friday night for my 40th Birthday celebrations it was amazing makes the party too everyone loved it definitely be intouch again for more functions thank you 😊

I loved it, they are very professional, they offered me something different from the norm with a beautiful structure, personalized video with excellent image quality.
             They were very punctual and I also loved the accessories, red carpet, lots of light. Excellent service, I recommend it.

Absolutely 100% satisfied with this company.
The booking process was very easy, the customer service is spot on, and everything was explained properly before booking.
            
The operators, Razvan and Paul were on time and the station looked very posh and sparkly.
Absolutely recommended them. Well worth the money I spent.

I recently hired the 360° photo booth from FunLoading360 for a party in Essex, and it was the highlight of the event! The booth captured stunning slow-motion videos with incredible special effects that had all our guests talking.
             The team was professional, friendly, and made the entire process seamless.

We recently used FunLoading360 for a event, and they were great! The setup was sleek and professional, and the 360 video experience was a huge hit with our guests.
             The team were friendly, efficient, and ensured everything ran smoothly.

We hired them after another supplier let us down with 4 days notice. The guys were super easy to communicate with and liaised with the venue for a seamless execution. I would recommend them to anyone!
Our school prom would not have been the same without FunLoading360. Even the shyest students loved it. Professional from start to finish.
Booked for our micro-wedding on a tight budget and received the same care and attention as any big event. That meant everything to us.
